task_completion.description: Verify the Change Request is created with the correct title and type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Change Request form or details page shows the title containing 'Campus Network Core Switch Replacement' and the Change Type field is set to 'Normal'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Impact and Risk levels are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Impact and Risk fields or dropdowns are both visibly set to 'High'.

task_completion.description: Verify the required detailed plans are included in the Change Request.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text areas for Reason (mentioning EOL), Rollout Plan, and Backout Plan contain relevant descriptive text.

task_completion.description: Verify the specific VPN incident is linked to the Change Request.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A section for Linked Incidents, Requests, or Problems shows an association with Incident ID 1004 (or the VPN dropping issue).

task_completion.description: Verify at least one Change Task is attached to the Change Request.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Tasks' tab or section within the Change Request lists at least one implementation task (e.g., pre-deployment configuration backup).

task_completion.description: Verify the final status of the Change Request is submitted for CAB review.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The overall Status field or workflow stage of the Change Request is set to 'Requested'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web GUI to create the change request.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is interacting with an ITSM web application in a browser, not using terminal commands (like curl) to interact with an API.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually filled out the forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing into the web forms and clicking submit/save buttons, rather than just displaying a text document with the answers.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the application via database injection.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing SQL commands or direct database modifications to insert the change request.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Change Request title must contain 'Campus Network Core Switch Replacement'. The Change Type must be 'Normal'. The linked incident ID for the VPN connectivity issue is exactly 1004. At least 1 Change Task must be present. The final status of the Change Request must be 'Requested'.
